name: Summer Beach Gear — Cozy Pixel Art Props & Accessories
description:
All the gear for a perfect beach day! From surfboards and snorkels to deck chairs and the iconic inflatable flamingo — your beach is fully equipped.

✨ **Highlights:**
• All 18 sprites quality-checked (Curator Approved)
• Clean 1px black outlines for crisp readability
• 32×32 pixel art with curated 24-color palette
• Transparent PNG backgrounds

**Includes:**
• 18 unique sprites (32×32)
• Full sprite sheet strip
• CC0 license

**Perfect for:** Beach resort games, shopping sims, vacation RPGs, and cozy sandbox titles.
**Quality Score:** 8.1/10 — Curator Approved with Distinction
